title: TapeMouse
description: Automate any keybinding! With custom delays.
body:
This mod allows you to farm/boat/while doing other things, as you can un-focus the Minecraft window or with your installed mods.

You can set the delay to 0 to emulate a continues button press.

It may behave derpy if you don't alt-tab out properly, it depends on what you are holding and what you are pointing at. 

Don't use this on a server that doesn't allow AFK farming.
It is detectable, and I'm not planning on making it undetectable.

Don't blame me if you are banned!

You can open the mod menu with the default k button or select your own in the control settings, or use the commands below.
Use /tapemouse <off|keybinding> [delay] 

To get a list of all the keybinding names, use "/tapemouse".
